title: Meconopsis integrifolia
taxonomy: Meconopsis integrifolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae. This classification places it within the order Ranunculales. As a member of the Papaveraceae family, Meconopsis integrifolia shares characteristics with other flowering plants such as poppies and hellebores. The genus Meconopsis is a group of plants native to the Himalayas, and Meconopsis integrifolia is one of its species. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics of Meconopsis integrifolia with other plants in the Papaveraceae family.
uses: Meconopsis integrifolia. There is limited information available on the specific medicinal uses of Meconopsis integrifolia.
